title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises:
SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance International Enterprises!
